data: Revise how to recommend items and compare products

message: Let's revise how to recommend items and compare products in English.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"I would recommend [item] because [reason]."

A clear recommendation with a strong reason helps others make better decisions.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b89bb608-b4a0-47ff-8c2f-220b01faaf32-59.-Recommending-Items-and-Comparing-Products.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.

button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to recommend a tool to a colleague

1.I would recommend this accounting software because it simplifies billing and expense tracking.
2.This accounting software is useful but I am not sure if it will work for you.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to recommend a book

1.I would recommend this book because it offers practical advice on time management.
2.This book is interesting but it depends on what kind of books you usually like.

Correct answer: 1

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?

questions: "'1. A friend asks which phone to buy. How do you make a clear recommendation?'

'2. Your colleague asks which project management tool is best for the team. How do you recommend one?'

'3. Your family member asks which streaming service to subscribe to. How do you suggest one?'

'4. A friend asks which restaurant is worth visiting. How do you give a recommendation?'

'5. A colleague asks which learning platform is best for professional development. How do you recommend one?'"
